text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates that include the words “Autism Awareness.” The department shall design the plates in consultation with a representative of the Hope for Three nonprofit organization.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the trusteed programs within the office of the governor to make grants to a nonprofit organization whose primary purpose is to create awareness about and provide support to families living with autism spectrum disorder, to be used by that organization for that purpose.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.675 (Stop Human Trafficking License Plates) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(57), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.676 — Autism Awareness License Plates

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates that include the words “Autism Awareness.” The department shall design the plates in consultation with a representative of the Hope for Three nonprofit organization.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the trusteed programs within the office of the governor to make grants to a nonprofit organization whose primary purpose is to create awareness about and provide support to families living with autism spectrum disorder, to be used by that organization for that purpose.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.675 (Stop Human Trafficking License Plates) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(57), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 286 (H.B.4080), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*

Money deposited to that account may be used only by the trusteed programs within the office of the governor to make grants to a nonprofit organization whose primary purpose is to create awareness about and provide support to families living with autism spectrum disorder, to be used by that organization for that purpose.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.675 (Stop Human Trafficking License Plates) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(57), eff. September 1, 2023.
